tagline: A new version of alerts is now in Beta.
what_it_does: A new version of alerts is now in Beta. This version simplifies creating and managing alerts by consolidating query setup, conditions, schedules, and notification destinations into a single interface. You can still use legacy alerts alongside the new version.
why_it_matters: Use them to track business KPIs, monitor data quality, watch cost trends, and catch operational issues across your Databricks workloads.
plain_summary: A new version of alerts is now in Beta. This version simplifies creating and managing alerts by consolidating query setup, conditions, schedules, and notification destinations into a single interface.

capabilities.title: Walk through the alert editor
capabilities.desc: Walk through the alert editor end-to-end. Includes advanced settings and notification template customization.

capabilities.title: Find alerts on the listing
capabilities.desc: Find alerts on the listing page, share them, transfer ownership, and track changes with Databricks Git folders.

key_takeaway: A new version of alerts is now in Beta.
